name: Promo
description: Outcomes from promo segments affecting crowd reaction and grades

entries.templateText: {WRESTLER_1} grabs the mic and cuts a blistering promo declaring they are done waiting — {WRESTLER_2} gets a title match next week or {WRESTLER_1} walks.
{WRESTLER_1}'s promo falls flat as the crowd chants for {WRESTLER_2} throughout, completely undercutting the moment.
{WRESTLER_1} stands on the announcer's desk, hoisting their championship gear and issuing a worldwide open challenge to anyone in the back.
{WRESTLER_1} demands a microphone, pointing directly at the champion's locker room and vowing to take everything they hold dear.
{WRESTLER_1} interrupts a championship celebration, listing every single shortcut the titleholder took to keep the gold.
{WRESTLER_1} cuts an intense, pre-taped vignette from the streets of their hometown, promising a championship reign built on raw sacrifice.
{WRESTLER_1} guarantees victory in the upcoming title bout, bringing out an actual contract to force a high-stakes signature from the champion.
{WRESTLER_1} lays down their ultimate ultimatum: a championship match at the grandest event of the year, or they tear the division apart.
{WRESTLER_1} targets the champion's lineage, claiming the gold was handed to them on a silver platter rather than truly earned.
{WRESTLER_1} lists every legend they've conquered, making it crystal clear that the reigning champion is merely the next victim on the list.
{WRESTLER_1} absolutely dismantles {WRESTLER_2} verbally, exposing their biggest career failures in a cold, calculated verbal takedown.
{WRESTLER_1} uses inside knowledge to mock the personal life of {WRESTLER_2}, leaving them visibly shaken and speechless center ring.
{WRESTLER_1} brings up old developmental footage of {WRESTLER_2}, laughing at how little talent they had then and how little they have now.
{WRESTLER_1} systematically breaks down the wrestling style of {WRESTLER_2}, calling them an unoriginal, over-hyped indie cosplay act.
{WRESTLER_1} informs {WRESTLER_2} that they are nothing more than a transitional opponent meant to pad a real superstar's win-loss record.
{WRESTLER_1} delivers an incredibly harsh truth bomb regarding the crowd's fading interest in {WRESTLER_2}, drawing a stunned gasp from the arena.
{WRESTLER_1} calls {WRESTLER_2} a spineless coward who hides behind faction members because they can't survive a single one-on-one encounter.
{WRESTLER_1} brings out a custom highlight reel showcasing every time {WRESTLER_2} has tapped out or fallen short on the big stage.
{WRESTLER_2} completely interrupts a lengthy monologue from {WRESTLER_1}, hitting them with a brilliant, lightning-fast comeback line that leaves {WRESTLER_1} stuttering.
{WRESTLER_2} fires back at the arrogant claims of {WRESTLER_1}, delivering a passionate, throat-tearing promo that brings the entire arena to its feet.
{WRESTLER_2} exposes a major hypocrisy in the career of {WRESTLER_1}, completely turning the live audience against the self-proclaimed hero.
{WRESTLER_2} stands toe-to-toe with {WRESTLER_1}, telling them to stop talking about past accolades and actually fight right now.
{WRESTLER_2} delivers a short, incredibly punchy response that makes {WRESTLER_1} look completely foolish and over-rehearsed.
{WRESTLER_2} commands the microphone, reminding {WRESTLER_1} exactly who built this division while {WRESTLER_1} was sitting on the sidelines.
{WRESTLER_2} drops the mic entirely, staring deep into the eyes of a ranting {WRESTLER_1} with complete, unbothered confidence.
{WRESTLER_2} uses a brilliant chant to get twenty thousand fans actively mocking {WRESTLER_1} out of the building.
{WRESTLER_1} delivers an exceptionally emotional speech about overcoming adversity, beautifully connecting with every single fan in attendance.
{WRESTLER_1} takes a moment to thank the local city, seamlessly transitioning into a high-energy rallying cry that electrifies the stadium.
{WRESTLER_1} speaks directly to a young fan in the front row, promising to bring the championship home for everyone who ever felt left behind.
{WRESTLER_1} leads the entire arena in a massive, thunderous catchphrase chant that completely echoes through the broadcast audio.
{WRESTLER_1} uses their incredible charisma to turn an otherwise standard interview segment into a massive, arena-wide party atmosphere.
{WRESTLER_1} acknowledges their past mistakes on the microphone, earning a deep, genuine wave of respect and applause from the audience.
{WRESTLER_1} speaks from the heart about their grueling path to the roster, prompting a massive standing ovation across all seating sections.
{WRESTLER_1} delivers a masterclass in crowd manipulation, having the fans hanging on every single syllable they utter.
{WRESTLER_1} attempts to cut a deeply villainous heel promo, but their insult toward {WRESTLER_2} is so incredibly cool that the crowd starts cheering instead.
{WRESTLER_1} tries to draw cheap heat by insulting the local sports team, but the crowd completely drowns them out with a massive chant for {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_1} spends minutes bragging about their expensive lifestyle, only for the crowd to erupt into a loud chant labeling them completely boring.
{WRESTLER_1} demands absolute silence from the audience, which immediately prompts a stadium-wide, chaotic singing chant that derails the entire script.
{WRESTLER_1} insults the integrity of {WRESTLER_2}, but the crowd response is so overwhelmingly supportive of {WRESTLER_2} that {WRESTLER_1} visibly loses their temper.
{WRESTLER_1} tries to explain their treacherous actions from last week, but the crowd's deafening refusal to listen completely ruins the explanation.
A controversial, unscripted social media video posted by {WRESTLER_1} surfaces on the titan screen, exposing a massive secret alliance.
{WRESTLER_2} leaks a series of private, highly toxic text messages sent by {WRESTLER_1}, completely shattering the pristine public image of {WRESTLER_1}.
{WRESTLER_1} goes live on social media from an unauthorized location, trashing management and threatening to hijack tonight's broadcast.
A viral training video posted by {WRESTLER_2} gains immense mainstream traction, generating massive fan support ahead of the match with {WRESTLER_1}.
{WRESTLER_1} starts an aggressive, online trending campaign that successfully makes {WRESTLER_2} the absolute laughingstock of the internet.
A wild, multi-platform internet flame war between {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} reaches a boiling point, forcing the promotion to address it on air.
{WRESTLER_1} posts an incredibly disrespectful video from inside the training facility of {WRESTLER_2}, defacing their personal property.
An anonymous account leaks footage of {WRESTLER_1} training with a banned foreign object, drawing heavy scrutiny from the fan base.
During a tense backstage sit-down interview, {WRESTLER_1} drops a massive bombshell revealing that {WRESTLER_2} actively tried to get them fired.
An exclusive media scrum interview goes completely off the rails as {WRESTLER_1} flips a table and storms out after a question about {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_1} breaks character slightly during a late-night talk show appearance, delivering a deeply authentic warning straight to {WRESTLER_2}.
A legendary broadcast journalist conducts a hard-hitting interview with {WRESTLER_2}, perfectly highlighting their struggle against an oppressive {WRESTLER_1}.
Backstage cameras capture {WRESTLER_1} having an incredibly intense, closed-door argument with their long-time personal trainer.
{WRESTLER_1} interrupts a routine broadcast update, commandeering the microphone to reveal a shocking injury status report regarding {WRESTLER_2}.
A special documentary chronicle tracks the intense preparation of {WRESTLER_1}, making their upcoming match feel like an absolute historic event.
{WRESTLER_1} crashes a corporate sponsor presentation backstage, demanding that their face be placed on every piece of promotional material.
{WRESTLER_1} calls out the General Manager directly, claiming the entire corporate system is actively rigged to prevent them from becoming champion.
{WRESTLER_1} refuses to compete tonight, calling the corporate executives completely incompetent until their exact financial demands are met.
{WRESTLER_1} tears up a formal disciplinary memo live on television, completely defying an official suspension order from management.
{WRESTLER_1} brings an actual lawyer into the ring, threatening a massive, company-wide lawsuit if they are forced to wrestle {WRESTLER_2} tonight.
{WRESTLER_1} sits down in the center of the ring, staging a complete broadcast protest until the Board of Directors grants them a meeting.
{WRESTLER_1} targets the authority figure's past career, delivering a blistering verbal takedown of their failed run as an active competitor.
{WRESTLER_1} attacks an official corporate spokesperson on the microphone, completely crossing the line into total corporate insubordination.
{WRESTLER_1} hijacks the production truck, cutting off the executive producer's audio feed to broadcast their own raw, unfiltered manifesto.
{WRESTLER_1} invokes the legendary history of the territory, delivering a deeply traditional, old-school promo centered on fighting honor and respect.
{WRESTLER_1} brings out a Hall of Fame veteran to endorse them, cementing their status as the true, hand-picked future of the entire industry.
{WRESTLER_1} claims that the current generation of wrestlers has completely gone soft, vowing to bring back a brutal style of old-school discipline.
{WRESTLER_1} delivers an incredibly powerful tribute promo honoring a fallen legend, uniting the roster and the fans in a beautiful moment.
{WRESTLER_1} talks about their twenty-year career, stating that their upcoming match with {WRESTLER_2} is a matter of securing their ultimate legacy.
{WRESTLER_1} openly mocks a legendary veteran who is sitting at ringside, completely disrespecting the rich history of the business.
{WRESTLER_1} compares their current historic championship reign to the greatest icons of the past, claiming they've already surpassed every single one.
{WRESTLER_1} delivers a chilling promo about what it truly means to be a professional wrestler, earning a rare nod of respect from their worst critics.
The verbal battle between {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} becomes so incredibly intense that they drop their microphones and immediately start swinging fists.
{WRESTLER_1} blindsides {WRESTLER_2} with a microphone shot right to the head mid-sentence, initiating a wild, chaotic ring-clearing brawl.
A massive face-to-face promo segment completely breaks down as twenty locker room security guards swarm the ring to keep {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} apart.
{WRESTLER_1} attempts to attack {WRESTLER_2} during their entrance promo, leading to an incredibly frantic brawl that spills all over the concrete floor.
A tense contract signing promo dissolves into absolute chaos as {WRESTLER_1} throws {WRESTLER_2} directly through the heavy wooden signing table.
{WRESTLER_2} ducks a surprise attack from {WRESTLER_1} at the end of a promo, hitting their finisher to stand tall over a broken {WRESTLER_1}.
A heated back-and-forth verbal argument escalates until {WRESTLER_1}'s entire stable rushes the ring, initiating a brutal numbers-game assault on {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} lock eyes, throw their microphones over the top rope, and launch into a vicious hockey-style punch exchange as the crowd goes insane.
